feature.name: URL parse, join, query, and path model
feature.description: Extract yarl.URL immutable URL data model with RFC 3986 parsing, relative join, query MultiDict semantics, path normalization, and IDNA host handling without aiohttp or network I/O.
included_behaviors: parse and construct URL objects with scheme, host, port, path, query, fragment
join absolute and relative URLs preserving query and fragment rules
MultiDict query with duplicate keys, ordering, and semicolon-in-value handling
path normalization for dot and dot-dot segments
IDNA host encoding and decoding; default port omission in string form
excluded_behaviors: aiohttp, network I/O, HTTP client/server integration
Cython _quoting_c extension build (pure-Python quoting fallback only)
upstream test suite, docs, CI, and packaging metadata at runtime
original yarl package import at runtime

entanglement.description: URL behavior couples split/join parsing, percent-encoding quoters, MultiDict query serialization, path normalization, and cached IDNA host transforms across multiple internal modules.
signals: split_url and join must agree on authority, path, and query composition
query encoding interacts with quoters and multidict duplicate-key semantics
path normalization affects join and joinpath results
IDNA encode/decode caching and host validation cross-cut URL construction
immutable URL updates flow through internal from_parts state

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import URL, Query, QueryVariable, SimpleQuery, cache_clear, cache_configure, cache_info
